description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, staging, and deploy, using python:3.6 for the unit tests and ruby:2.4 for the Heroku deployment jobs. In the UnitTest job (stage test) the before_script adds Google’s signing key, configures the Chrome apt source, installs pip dependencies, runs Django migrations, installs unzip, google-chrome-stable and xvfb, downloads and extracts chromedriver, collects static files and starts the development server in the background. Its script runs coverage run --include=landing_page/*,member/*,event_page/*,event/*,about/*,news/* manage.py test followed by coverage report -m, and it runs on_success. The Staging job (stage staging) uses ruby:2.4, installs the dpl gem and Heroku CLI in before_script, sets the environment name to production with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST_TEST, runs only on the dev@E3-PPW-1/storytugas1 branch, and its script deploys to Heroku with dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME_TEST --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY, exports HEROKU_API_KEY, then runs heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME_TEST migrate. The Deployment job (stage deploy) is identical but runs only on master@E3-PPW-1/storytugas1, uses $HEROKU_APP_HOST as the URL, and deploys to $HEROKU_APPNAME.
